specific_question: What percentage of Elexion Automotive sales staff actively use the CRM system?
answer: In November 2024, Amanda Lee, in a brief morning meeting, highlighted that 94% of the Elexion Automotive sales team logged into the CRM system more than once a day with an average session of 37 minutes.
dr_question: By the end of 2025, how can Elexion Automotive use data generated through its customer relationship management system to analyze customer behavior online and identify patterns that drive sales?
